coordinateBridge.rule: project joint positions through calibrated T-pose frames; do not transfer quaternions or solve roll before FK

sword.policy: observation-only; sword landmarks are not arm solver inputs

findings: Worst FK joint position is LeftHand from Hand.L: avg 0.22811, max 0.22854.
Left arm FK position is worse than right: left avg 0.21012, right avg 0.1964.
Worst roll divergence is RightHand: avg abs 82.47 deg, max abs 82.798 deg.
Sword grip error is 0.089 avg while blade tip error is 0.67092 avg, so tip/orientation divergence dominates attachment placement.
FK-only reconstruction is structurally close enough for silhouette analysis before IK/roll: avg 0.17422, max 0.22854.
Roll remains dangerous: max abs roll error 82.798 deg can visually destroy a pose even when joint positions are close.
